changes.reason: call_wall_acceptance_long is enabled and routed but still produced zero trades. Lowering the profile-local net DEX gate to the lowest grid value is the cleanest way to test whether the profile is simply unreachable, without touching option-aware routing or non-call-wall profiles.

The current 0.05 forward-DEX ratio may be too restrictive for sample discovery. A 0.03 grid value keeps positive forward DEX confirmation but should admit moderate call-wall acceptance states for attribution.

The prior 0.05/45s call-wall builder improved from a damaged base, but the latest attribution still showed zero call_wall_acceptance_long trades. Keep the call-volume expansion requirement at the loosest grid value to avoid testing an unreachable branch.

Increase acceptance duration to 60 seconds rather than repeating the prior 45-second keyset. This tests sustained wall acceptance after relaxing DEX gates, reducing the chance that lower DEX thresholds admit transient call-wall chop.

expected_effect: Should either create a small standalone call_wall_acceptance_long sample or prove the trigger is structurally unreachable. Desired result is at least 3 positive-expectancy call-wall trades with total net profit retained above 98% of run_044 and no deterioration in VALID_0DTE core profiles. Tradeoff is possible cannibalization of stronger charm/pullback entries if call-wall priority captures marginal acceptance states.
label: call-wall-sustained-sample-builder
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long. The current leader base is strong, but call_wall_acceptance_long remains enabled with zero trades, so its value cannot be estimated. This is a profile-specific sample-builder, not a global veto or missing-0DTE change. It differs from the recently rejected duplicate by using 60-second sustained acceptance and the lowest DEX grid, while preserving positive forward DEX and call-volume expansion confirmation.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long is active in the VALID_0DTE router and enabled, but latest profile attribution shows 0 trades and 0 PnL while other option-aware profiles remain profitable. Prior call-wall loosening repaired a damaged run but did not produce call-wall attribution, implying the branch may still be over-filtered or cannibalized before execution.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call Wall Acceptance Isolated Sample Builder
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Looser DEX gates may admit call-wall chop or steal trades from higher-expectancy charm_wall_breakaway_long and pullback_long without adding net PnL.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE call-wall acceptance context with positive forward DEX, call-volume expansion, and sustained strike acceptance for 60 seconds.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: At least 3 call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive standalone PnL, profile PnL/exposure hour >=150, total net profit >=98% of run_044, completed trades within 10% of baseline, slow_12h remains 0, and VALID_0DTE core profile PnL is not materially cannibalized.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short, high-win-rate, take-profit-only SPX500 long scalper sample over about 12.3 days. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, but MAE and capital tie-up are the real...
